context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements CanCanCan authorization: Ability class with guest-user guard, accessible_by for index scoping, authorize! in controller actions, and specs covering all three roles (finance, viewer, guest).

checklist.name: Ability class defined
checklist.description: app/models/ability.rb defines a class Ability that includes CanCan::Ability

checklist.name: Guest-user guard present
checklist.description: The Ability#initialize method contains `user ||= User.new` (or equivalent) to safely handle a nil/unauthenticated user before applying rules

checklist.name: Finance role can manage
checklist.description: The Ability class grants `can :manage, Report` (or explicit create/read/update/destroy) to users with the finance role

checklist.name: Viewer role read-only
checklist.description: The Ability class grants only `:read` (or `:index`/`:show`) to viewer-role users, without create/update/destroy

checklist.name: Guest role blocked
checklist.description: The Ability class does NOT grant any Report permissions to a guest (nil) user — no `can :read, Report` for unauthenticated state

checklist.name: load_and_authorize_resource used
checklist.description: The reports controller uses `load_and_authorize_resource` (or `authorize_resource`) rather than manually calling `authorize! :action, @report` in every action

checklist.name: Index uses accessible_by
checklist.description: The index action uses `Report.accessible_by(current_ability)` or delegates to `load_and_authorize_resource` (which handles scoping) rather than `Report.all`

checklist.name: Finance role tested
checklist.description: The ability spec (or request spec) includes a context for a finance-role user asserting that create/update/destroy actions are permitted

checklist.name: Viewer role tested
checklist.description: The ability spec includes a context for a viewer-role user asserting read is permitted and create/update/destroy are denied

checklist.name: Guest role tested
checklist.description: The ability spec includes a context for a nil user (guest) asserting that all actions are denied

checklist.name: cancancan gem referenced
checklist.description: implementation_notes.md or any output file references adding the `cancancan` gem to the Gemfile as a required setup step

checklist.name: No inline controller logic
checklist.description: The reports controller does NOT contain manual role checks (e.g., `if current_user.role == 'finance'`) inside action methods
